data.body: E4 COMPLETE — init/fsck/fsck-recover all in-process + auto-init consent gate. Commits: fsck (56e130ff), fsck-recover (07d7b495), init+gate (a9c4dd64). AC: init bootstrap ported (orphan branch/worktree, recovery, .gitignore/.env-id/.closure-key, lock, symlink case, idempotency) with byte-parity messages + identical tickets-branch tree; fsck (5 checks, text+json transform) + fsck-recover (rebase/cherry-pick recovery, exit 0/1/2/3) byte-parity; library init_repo/fsck rewired off subprocess. Consent gate: never inits without interactive [Y/n] confirmation or explicit init/init_repo() — non-interactive errors, validated for CLI(TTY+no-TTY)/library/MCP. Full suite 1714 passed; concurrency matrix green. Legacy bash dispatcher keeps silent auto-init (E7-deleted).
